◆ 001 — About

WHO
AM I?

I'm a creative student passionate about the intersection of visual art, anime culture, and music aesthetics. This portfolio showcases my ability to blend digital design with personal expression.

From crafting custom sticker sheets to building interactive web experiences — every project reflects what I love and how I think visually.

Inspired by The Neighbourhood, JJK, Naruto, and the belief that design should make you feel something.

Visual Design HTML / CSS Anime Culture Music Aesthetics Sticker Art Typography
◆ 002 — Gallery

STICKER
COLLECTION

Eight hand-picked stickers that define my aesthetic — anime legends, fire imagery, music nostalgia, and pure chaos. Each one tells a story.

◆ 003 — Skills

WHAT I
BRING

01
Visual Design
Creating aesthetic layouts, sticker art, and digital compositions that feel intentional and bold.
02
Web Development
HTML, CSS and JavaScript to build interactive, responsive pages from scratch.
03
Typography
Pairing display fonts with body fonts to create hierarchy, mood, and editorial style.
04
Cultural Curation
Connecting anime, music, and street aesthetics into a coherent visual language.
05
Print Design
Designing printable sticker sheets optimised for physical production and die-cutting.
06
Concept Thinking
Turning a simple idea (a phone case) into a full creative project with narrative and purpose.
